description: 1:1 prep sheet for Scott McMichael missed yesterday's Microsoft meetings: 'Work from Work Wednesday' at Microsoft Irving campus (with Lowell Messner), 'Microsoft Partner GTM Check In' (Ben Kennedy et al.), and Monday's 'Prep: Improving WWW Session' with Ben Holm from Microsoft. These are directly relevant to the Scott 1:1 as partner engagement context. Only searched March emails for Scott's name instead of also scanning the prior days' calendar for relevant meetings.
correction: Prep sheets should always scan the 3-5 days prior calendar for meetings with shared context — not just email threads mentioning the person.
systemic_fix: Meeting prep workflow must include: (1) scan prior 5 days of calendar for relevant meetings with the person or related topics, (2) scan upcoming 7 days for shared commitments. Don't limit context gathering to email search by name.
